steps.title: Add the equations
steps.content:
Add the left sides and right sides of the two equations:
$$
(x+8)+(x-8)=(-7y+3)+(7y+11)
$$
The $y$-terms cancel, and the constants on the left also cancel.

steps.title: Find the requested value
steps.content: After simplifying, the sum gives $$ 2x=14 $$ The question asks for the value of $2x$. The answer is C.
